case_title: JACK HAIN VS. WELLS FARGO AND COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 FILED BY HAIN, JACK AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO AND COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAIN, JACK AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO AND COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-03-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO AND COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAIN, JACK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO AND COMPANY $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $490.00, DEFENDANT IS CREDITED $450.00 FOR ITS RECENT PAYMENT. DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY IS LIMITED TO PAYMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S FILING FEE AND CERTIFIED MAIL COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO AND COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
